title: Profiler Module
description: Datadog PHP profiler (Rust extension). Collects wall-time, CPU-time, allocation, exception, timeline, and I/O samples from PHP via Zend Engine hooks. Profiles are aggregated into pprof format and uploaded to the Datadog agent every 67 seconds.

classes.name: Profiler
methods: collect_allocations(execute_data, alloc_samples: i64, alloc_size: i64, interrupt_count: Option<u32>)
collect_compile_string(now: i64, duration: i64, filename: String, line: u32)
collect_compile_file(now: i64, duration: i64, filename: String, include_type: &str)
collect_garbage_collection(now: i64, duration: i64, reason: &str, collected: i64)
collect_fatal(now: i64, file: String, line: u32, message: String)
collect_opcache_restart(now: i64, file: String, line: u32, reason: &str)
classes.notes: Global singleton stored in static mut PROFILER: OnceLock<Profiler>. Upload period=67s, wall-time tick=10ms.

classes.name: TimeCollector
methods: run(self) [main loop: ticks wall-time interrupt + upload every 67s]
classes.notes: Runs in 'ddprof_time' thread. Drives InterruptManager to trigger VM interrupts every 10ms. Batches SampleMessages into InternalProfile per ProfileIndex. Sends UploadRequest to Uploader on timeout.

classes.name: Uploader
methods: new(fork_barrier, receiver, output_pprof, endpoint, start_time, process_tags) -> Self
run(self) [main loop: receives UploadMessage, calls upload()]
classes.notes: Runs in 'ddprof_upload' thread. Serializes InternalProfile to compressed pprof via libdd_profiling::ProfileExporter. Sends HTTP to Datadog agent. Supports writing to .zst file for debug.

classes.name: SampleTypeFilter
classes.notes: 23 possible sample types. Always-on: sample/count, wall-time/ns. Optional: cpu-time, alloc-samples, alloc-size, timeline, exception-samples, 16 IO types. Controlled by SystemSettings feature flags.

classes.name: InterruptManager
methods: trigger_interrupts() [atomically increments interrupt_count + sets engine flag]

classes.name: VmInterrupt
classes.notes: Raw pointers into PHP VM thread-local state. unsafe Send impl.

classes.name: ZendFrame
classes.notes: Max string length = 16,383 bytes (varint fits 2 bytes). Truncated to [suspiciously large string] if exceeded. Max stack depth = 512 frames; last frame replaced with [truncated].

classes.name: ProfileIndex
classes.notes: Key for HashMap<ProfileIndex, InternalProfile>. Different services/tags produce separate profiles.

classes.name: Label
classes.notes: Common labels: thread_id, thread_name, local_root_span_id, span_id, trace_endpoint

classes.name: AllocationProfilingStats
classes.notes: Default sampling distance = 4 MiB. Poisson sampling. Thread-local. ALLOCATION_PROFILING_INTERVAL: AtomicU64 global.

classes.name: ExceptionProfilingStats
classes.notes: Default interval = every 100 exceptions. Poisson sampling. Thread-local. EXCEPTION_PROFILING_INTERVAL: AtomicU32 global.

classes.name: SystemSettings
classes.notes: Holds all profiling feature flags: profiling_enabled, profiling_experimental_cpu_time_enabled, profiling_allocation_enabled, profiling_exception_enabled, profiling_timeline_enabled, profiling_io_enabled, profiling_endpoint_collection_enabled, etc. Also: uri: AgentEndpoint, output_pprof.

key_relationships: Profiler sends ProfilerMessage to TimeCollector via bounded channel (capacity 100)
TimeCollector sends UploadMessage to Uploader via bounded channel (capacity 8)
TimeCollector uses InterruptManager::trigger_interrupts() on wall-time tick
TimeCollector aggregates SampleMessage into HashMap<ProfileIndex, InternalProfile>
Uploader uses libdd_profiling::ProfileExporter to serialize+upload profiles
ProfileIndex implements Hash/Eq for use as HashMap key
Label converts to ApiLabel (libdd_profiling) via From trait
key_enums: ProfilerMessage: Cancel | Sample(SampleMessage) | LocalRootSpanResource(...) | Pause | Wake
important_notes: Rust implementation of a Datadog PHP profiler (datadog-profiling Zend extension)
Profiler is a global singleton (OnceLock), initialized on first RINIT, destroyed on mshutdown
Three-thread model: PHP request thread(s) + TimeCollector thread + Uploader thread
VM interrupts: TimeCollector ticks every 10ms -> triggers PHP engine interrupt -> PHP thread calls collect_time()
Poisson sampling for allocations (default 4 MiB interval) and exceptions (default every 100)
Profiles serialized to compressed pprof, uploaded every 67s to Datadog agent endpoint
Fork-safe: uses Arc<Barrier> (3 participants) to pause threads before fork, kill() on child
Stack walk: max 512 frames, string length capped at 16383 bytes, frameless calls handled
ProfileIndex hash key aggregates samples by service/tag combination into separate profiles
Endpoint profiling: LocalRootSpanResourceMessage updates profile with trace endpoint labels
PHP version compatibility: conditional compile for PHP 7/8, ZTS/NTS, 8.3-/8.4+ allocator hooks
